one_time_description: Settlement reached November 16, 2022 regarding litigation with former members of council; Band entitled to $3,475,431 compensation for damages, recoverability unknown
economic_notes: Band holds 25% in Pelltiq't Energy Group, 51% in Whispering Pines/A&T Limited Liability Partnership, and 51% in Whispering Pines/Marwest Limited Liability Partnership - all excluded from consolidation due to no active operations. Investment in BC First Nations Gaming LP recorded at $110. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent economic uncertainty. Rising interest rates and inflation noted due to 2022 world events.
notes: Audit qualified due to unaudited investments in Pelltiq't Energy Group (25%), Whispering Pines/A&T LLP (51%), and Whispering Pines/Marwest LLP (51%) with no active operations recorded. Financial statements signed February 1, 2023 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 - significant delay. Subsequent event: $3,475,431 litigation settlement with recoverability uncertain. Obligations under capital lease of $19,157 included in liabilities separately from long-term debt. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC $975,696 + CMHC $12,015 + FNHA $102,221 + Province of BC $500,968 + FNESC $7,500 = $1,598,400. expenses_housing combines band-owned housing $116,569 and social housing $16,714. No remuneration schedule present in document.
